title: The Legend of Jeff
description: Legend of Jeff offers players a new level of difficulty and an atmosphere of terror.
body:
Appears at night: Only during the dark hours does the mob emerge from hiding and begin hunting players.
Attacks players: With aggressive artificial intelligence, Jeff actively pursues and attacks players, turning nighttime walks through the forest into a true ordeal.
Boasts a unique appearance: The mob features a custom model and texture, as well as a characteristic pose with his left arm raised, which gives him a menacing look.
Creates an atmosphere of horror: Thanks to refined spawning mechanics and hostile behavior, the mod creates a tense and grim environment—perfect for horror fans.
Legend of Jeff will be an extra addition for those who want to experience new thrills and bring an element of genuine fear into the world of Minecraft.
Battle the nightmares and prove that you can use your capote!
